arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Aston Villa LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as hosts look to keep up title chase
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta’s side look to keep up the pressure on league leaders Liverpool

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Aston Villa - TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to secure back-to-back wins when they take on Aston Villa in the Premier League this weekend and close the gap to Liverpool at the top of the table.. Yes, the match will be live on Sky Sports Premier League and Main Event channels.

arts.ttl: ‘Main obstacle’ to Arsenal exit explained – Talks ongoing, Gunners not playing ball
arts.sum: Flamengo remain in talks with Arsenal midfielder Jorginho to try and find an agreement for the January transfer window. That’s according to GE Global, who report that the ‘main obstacle’ for the transfer is money. The player and the Brazilian club are yet to find common ground on that front. arts.ttl: Man United vs. Arsenal: Red Devils 'hopeful' of beating Gunners to 32-goal striker
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly hope to beat Premier League rivals Arsenal to the signature of Sporting Lisbon centre-forward Viktor Gyokeres.

arts.ttl: Arsenal avoid nightmare Champions League transfer scenario after stunning Mikel Arteta comeback
arts.sum: That does mean that if Arsenal qualify then they can rely on any new signings made this month but after an impressive comeback in the competition, they don't have to be too worried about not having extra reinforcements for the last two matches. Arsenal are currently third in the group phase with two matches left to play.

arts.ttl: Arsenal early team news decision confirmed before Aston Villa amid William Saliba fears
arts.sum: Young Arsenal defender Maldini Kacurri has not been included in Saturday's Premier League 2 squad for a game away to Fulham. Kacurri has trained under Arteta with the senior players previously, first doing so in 2022 as a 17-year-old.

arts.ttl: Gittens bombshell! Arsenal to sign Dortmund winger if...
arts.sum: Jamie Gittens will leave Borussia Dortmund if they fail to qualify for the Champions League this season, according to German media. Sahin was already under massive pressure heading into the winter break and the scrutiny has only increased since the Bundesliga returned, with Dortmund losing all of their three matches so far.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'weighing up' £70m Benjamin Sesko move as Gunners step up striker search
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly considering whether to make a £70m bid to sign Slovenia international Benjamin Sesko from RB Leipzig.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa and Tottenham given 30% of transfer – ‘Still keen’ as club eye summer profit
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Tottenham Hotspur are ‘still keen’ on striker Stefanos Tzimas, with FC Nuremberg eyeing up a summer deal for him. That’s according to BILD, who report that Aston Villa and Tottenham have a 30% chance of signing the youngster in the summer. arts.ttl: How Much Arsenal Have Spent Under Arteta Compared to Premier League Big Six
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal have spent much less than the likes of Premier League trumvirate Manchester United, Tottenham Hotspur and Chelsea.
